full_text_english: Trump's CIA claims to have just used a secret AI tool and rescued a soldier just by detecting his heartbeat!Called Ghost Murmur, the classified weapon was used by the CIA for the first time ever to rescue an airforce officer codenamed, “Dude 44 Bravo”, who had been shot down by the Iranian army last week. In fact, Iranian ground troops had placed a bounty on him after shooting him down. But before they could nab him, the CIA came to his rescue by detecting his heartbeat from the skies.
